name: Lobscouse (Lobscows)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and dice them into 1-inch pieces.
2. Scrape the carrots and slice them.
3. Peel the onion and slice it.
4. Dice the meat into 1-inch pieces.
5. Place the meat in a large saucepan with the carrots, onions, salt, and about 2 pints of water.
6. Boil for half an hour.
7. Add the potatoes and boil for a further half hour.
This is the recipe handed down to me by my mother and father. I believe lobscouse was a meal that the slate quarry men in North Wales ate when they came home at night. -- Ieuan
